key_changes.upload_sync.dart: Created comprehensive UploadSync service (678 lines) with GraphQL mutation support for all entity types
key_changes.sync_manager_impl.dart: Integrated UploadSync into sync pipeline with progress tracking and error handling
key_changes.offline_module.dart: Registered UploadSync as singleton dependency in DI module
key_changes.dio_api_service.dart: Added dio getter for accessing HTTP client

patterns_discovered.dependency_injection: Singleton pattern for services using GetIt DI container
patterns_discovered.graphql_integration: GraphQL mutations for entity synchronization (Trips, Journals, User Profiles, Travel Preferences)
patterns_discovered.queue_management: Priority-based operation processing with retry logic
patterns_discovered.progress_tracking: Real-time sync status updates with percentage calculation
patterns_discovered.error_handling: Comprehensive error handling with exponential backoff
patterns_discovered.code_organization: Barrel exports for clean module imports

gotchas_discovered.sync_phases: Upload sync implemented separately from download sync (5.2 vs 5.3)
gotchas_discovered.retry_mechanism: Failed operations marked with errors for retry based on SyncOperationEntity's existing logic
gotchas_discovered.partial_success: Returns success count even if some operations fail, allowing retries
gotchas_discovered.progress_calculation: Progress tracked as 10% to 50% during upload phase
gotchas_discovered.dio_injection: UploadSync depends on DioApiService's dio getter rather than ApiService interface

approach_outcome.implementation_strategy: Top-down approach with clear separation of concerns
approach_outcome.code_quality: High-quality implementation with comprehensive documentation and debug logging
approach_outcome.testing_preparation: Clean dependency injection setup facilitates unit testing
approach_outcome.scalability: Modular design supports future sync phases (download, conflict resolution)
approach_outcome.maintainability: Clear file organization and barrel exports improve code maintainability

technical.next_step: Implement download sync (Subtask 5.3) to complete bidirectional synchronization
technical.enhancement: Consider adding detailed logging for performance monitoring
technical.optimization: Implement batch processing for large number of queued operations

architecture.consistency: Ensure download sync follows same patterns as upload sync
architecture.testing: Add comprehensive unit tests for UploadSync service

future_work.offline_robustness: Enhance offline mode handling with better error recovery
